1700390.name: Tower!3D Pro - WSSS airport
1700390.description:
IATA: SIN, ICAO: WSSS



Changi Airport is at the eastern end of Singapore close to Marina Bay downtown. As one of the world's busiest airports by international passenger and cargo traffic. It has been rated the World's Best Airport by Skytrax, highly rated international transit transports and it is one of the world's cleanest airports.

It is the home base of Singapore Airlines, Singapore Airlines Cargo, Jetstar Asia Airways, Scoot and BOC Aviation.
Changi served 68.3 million passengers in 2019, making it the 18th busiest airport in the world.
It has 3 asphalt runways and five main passenger terminals arranged in an elongated inverted 'U'shape with Jewel in the center of the 'U' shape.
